source_pr.title: sql: implement `SHOW BR JOBS <n:int>` and `CANCEL BR JOB <n:int>`
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/43072 close 

Problem Summary:
This PR implemented two new SQLs.

### What is changed and how it works?
`SHOW BR JOB QUERY <n:int>` will display the origin SQL of the backup job. <del>(***WARNING:** the secret keys may not be redacted. So it requires `BACKUP_ADMIN or SUPER` role to be executed.*)</del>
`CANCEL BR JOB <n:int>` will cancel a running BR job. This just trivially cancel the context of the BR CLI for now.
This PR also exported the `ID` row of the backups to the result of `SHOW BACKUPS` and `SHOW RESTORES`, so you can reference it at the former SQLs.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Documentation

- [x] Affects user behaviors
- [x] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
Added support for `SHOW BR JOBS <n:int>` and `CANCEL BR JOB <n:int>`.
```
